name: NexCampus v2.17.2
changelog: Windows binary now includes Python 3.12 embeddable (code runner works out of box)
Windows binary includes full Python deps (numpy, scipy, sklearn etc.)
App icon embedded in Windows and Linux binaries
JS print() no longer opens browser dialog
Detailed planet info with Details tab
3 new dwarf planets, Tour mode, keyboard nav, shooting stars
GitHub Actions auto-builds Windows + Linux binaries
